title: Height Dependent Ores
description: Changes the texture for ores when at the optimal Y Level
body:
Changes the texture of all Ores, including Nether Ores & Ancient Debris when at the optimal generation Y Level. Assists in knowing that you are mining at the optimal Y level without needing to check the Ore Distribution on the Wiki.

OPTIFINE / CTM REQUIRED

BY: CADAVER / CADAVERPILLED
